local_branch_eligibility.reason: Branch satisfies relational clock monotonicity and node distance constraints.

convention_ledger.description: Choice of relational clock parameter phi is local and uncalibrated.
Classical Friedmann target is a toy-model minisuperspace limit.
Units of gravity and fields are not physically matched.
Sign conventions for relational variables require physical calibration.
Normalization factors for amplitude and metrics are uncalibrated.
Physical faithfulness remains contested under adversarial EBP review.

calculation_ledger.formula_description: Candidate toy diagnostic computed from adjacent local-branch trajectory point differences: residual = ((delta alpha/delta lambda)^2 - (delta phi/delta lambda)^2). This is not a recovery claim.
